GeoJSON

GeoJSON is a widely used format for encoding geographic data structures using JSON.

In miraX, GeoJSON is used to represent and exchange spatial data such as points, lines, and polygons.

Structure

A GeoJSON file consists of:

  • Geometry (Point, LineString, Polygon)
  • Properties (attributes)
  • Feature collections

Example: 

{
  "type": "Feature",
  "geometry": {
    "type": "Point",
    "coordinates": [-78.4678, -0.1807]
  },
  "properties": {
    "name": "Sensor Location"
  }
}

Supported Geometry Types

  • Point
  • LineString
  • Polygon
  • MultiPoint
  • MultiLineString
  • MultiPolygon

Use in miraX

  • Upload custom layers
  • Visualise assets and infrastructure
  • Display analysis results
  • Exchange spatial datasets

Suggested Images
